edge_hypothesis: Supertrend direction flips in strong ADX trends capture the early phase of persistent ETH moves. Crypto trends cluster: once ADX confirms trend strength, the Supertrend flip signals the start of a directional leg. Asymmetric exits (tight stop, wide TP at 2.5-3.5x ATR) exploit fat-tailed trending moves while limiting whipsaw damage. Regime assumption: TRENDING only (ADX>25). Invalidation: if PF<0.95 across 100+ trades on ETH/4h, the trend-persistence assumption is wrong for this indicator combination.

variants.name: supertrend_conservative_high_adx
variants.description: High-conviction Supertrend entries requiring ADX>30 for confirmed strong trends. Wide 3.5:1 R:R to minimize fee drag by taking fewer, larger-payoff trades.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (direction change).
Bar-close execution only, no intra-bar entries.
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (direction change).
Bar-close execution only, no intra-bar entries.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit long when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips negative.
Exit short when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips positive.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Choppy sideways market causes rapid Supertrend flips
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.5x ATR_14 from entry.
Max drawdown cap: 15% (target tighter DD on ETH/4h).

variants.name: supertrend_moderate_balanced
variants.description: Balanced Supertrend entries with ADX>25 gate. 2.5:1 R:R balances win rate against payoff ratio. Targets the ETH/4h trending PF=1.054 regime.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (direction change).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (direction change).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit long when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips negative.
Exit short when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips positive.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (2.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Choppy sideways market causes rapid Supertrend flips
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: supertrend_wide_stop_trending
variants.description: Wider stop (1.5x ATR) to avoid premature stopouts in volatile ETH trends. Compensated by 3:1 R:R. Tests whether giving trades room to breathe improves the trending-regime PF.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (direction change).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (direction change).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit long when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips negative.
Exit short when SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips positive.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (4.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Wider stop increases loss magnitude in choppy regimes
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 4.5x ATR_14 from entry.
